infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Island Chat to access your photos so you can send pictures in chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Island Chat to save photos you share in chats.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Island Chat to use the camera so you can take and send photos in chats.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Island Chat to access the microphone so you can record and send voice notes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Island Chat to access your photos so you can send pictures in chats.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Island Chat to use the camera so you can take and send photos in chats.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Island Chat to access the microphone so you can record and send voice notes.
